section_analysis.description: Narrative intro. Childlike delivery. Rhythmic accordion and bells.
Obsessive crescendo. 'Aishite' chant motif. Multi-layered vocal textures.

lyrics.original: 愛して 愛して 愛して もっともっと
いい成績でしょ ねえ ねえ いい子でしょ
lyrics.romaji: Ii seiseki desho nee nee ii ko desho
lyrics.meta: Core thematic line. Plea for validation.

stylistic_dna.vocal_texture: Hatsune Miku - Shifting from innocent whisper to chaotic scream
